article.title: Uber SDE2 Chances
article.content:
Role: SDE-2 Backend
YOE: 3.9
Location - Bangalore, India

Phone Screen
https://leetcode.com/problems/first-unique-number/description/

# Round 1

Currency Conversion - https://leetcode.com/discuss/post/483660/google-phone-currency-conversion-by-anon-upqo/

Give a list of currencies and their conversion rates, calculate the conversion rate between ```from``` to ```to```


Follow up - If multiple paths are possible return the path which has highest value. Tried Djikstra's but later realized it doesn't work (since we're multiplying edge weights instead of adding). Time was up before implementing bellman ford. Conveyed the same to interviewer

# Round 2 - DSA
Was expecting a LLD round but was instead asked dsa. 

https://leetcode.com/problems/split-array-largest-sum/description/

Went with the dp approach initially, wasted a lot of time in this. After a slight nudge from interviewer realized it's a binary search and completed the question.

Recruiter called after this and said both rounds were medium hire

# Round 3 - HLD
Stock alerting System. Was able to complete hld and also address most of the deep dives. 
Added and additional component which was reducing latency but at greater cost tradeoff, interviewer pointed out the same

# Managerial Round
Was initially asked to explain my previous project. It involved a lot of components and services, so explained it in detail. Also was asked some behavioral questions which I felt answered pretty good.


**What do you guys think are the chances of getting an offer?**

post.content: sounds solid to me. best wishes!
how long has it been since the interview? I\'m expecting to hear back tomorrow (ig the debrief happens on monday)
Mind telling which country this was in?
is it for backend or apps
bro wtf, i dont think ill be able to crack uber sde2 anytime soon damn
